case_title: FRANK D ANGELO VS. ALEXIS MATUSEK

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-16-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-16-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF FRANK ANGELO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALEXIS MATUSEK IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ANGELO, FRANK D AS TO DEFENDANT MATUSEK, ALEXIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-16-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED OCT-26-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MATUSEK, ALEXIS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-16-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANGELO, FRANK D IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MATUSEK, ALEXIS THE EVIDENCE SUBMITTED DID NOT SUPPORT PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS BY A PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE THAT AN ACT OR OMISSION BY THE DEFENDANT WAS A CAUSE OF DAMAGE, LOSS OR HARM TO THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
